##############  MG1908 dataset Description########################################################
#         MG1908 is a dataset of 1908 Non-redundant PDB chain of MG interacting protein chains.
#         This dataset is generated by Blastclust (25%) and LPC software.
#         PDB resolution is maximum 3 Angstrom and PDB chain length is minimum 80 amino acid.
#         and interaction distance (distance between MG - amino acid interaction) is 0-4.0 Angstrom.
#         There are three line in each PDB, First line is PDB ID with chain,
#         Second is  amino acid sequence in single letter code
#         and third line is assignment of MG molecule at each amino acid residue
#         corresponding to amino acid of respective PDB sequence, where plus (+) sign indicate
#         the corresponding amino acid occur in  MG interacting site while sign(-) indicates
#         non MG interacting amino acid residue.
#################### Dataset Description end    ################################################
